idea: Completely redesign and restructure the content for my existing goat care website, goatsauthority.com, so it covers goat care comprehensively and ranks for organic search.
nicheDescription: Practical goat care for everyday goat owners — feeding, nutrition, health and disease, housing and fencing, breeding and kidding, behavior, hoof and parasite care, and routine maintenance for hobby and homestead goats (dairy, meat, pet/companion, and fiber breeds).
audience: Goat owners and people who care for goats — hobbyists, homesteaders, and small-farm keepers, including many beginners. Not large commercial ranchers.
monetization: Display ads (primary) plus occasional affiliate commissions on goat supplies, feed, and gear
brandPositioning: Trustworthy, practical goat-care advice anyone can follow — clear, friendly, and beginner-welcoming, written by people who actually keep goats.
contentStyle: Plain-English, skimmable blog posts the average person can read — step-by-step, example-driven, and free of jargon.
